languages.text: "Боюсь, ваш меч — подделка. Вы рискуете жизнью, идя в сражение с ним".

traits.locale_text: "Боюсь, ваш меч — подделка, что может привести вас к гибели".

languages.text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."
languages.original_text: "Боюсь, ваш меч — подделка. Вы рискуете жизнью, идя в сражение с ним".

traits.locale_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."
"I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."
"I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

languages.text: “您的剑恐怕是赝品。带着它上战场，是在拿自己的性命开玩笑。”
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: “您的剑恐怕是赝品。带着它上战场，是在拿自己的性命开玩笑。”

languages.text: « J'ai bien peur que votre épée ne soit qu'une copie. Vous risquez votre vie en partant au combat avec cette lame. »
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien peur que votre épée ne soit qu'une copie. Vous risquez votre vie en partant au combat avec cette lame. »

languages.text: «Me temo que su espada es falsa. Se juega la vida al luchar con ella».
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que su espada es falsa. Se juega la vida al luchar con ella».

languages.text: "Korkarım kılıcın sahte. Onunla savaşa girerek hayatını riske atıyorsun."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: "Korkarım kılıcın sahte. Onunla savaşa girerek hayatını riske atıyorsun."

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, Euer Schwert ist ein Schwindel. Ihr riskiert Euer Leben, wenn Ihr damit in die Schlacht zieht."
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte, Euer Schwert ist ein Schwindel. Ihr riskiert Euer Leben, wenn Ihr damit in die Schlacht zieht."

languages.text: 「恐縮ですが、お剣は偽物です。偽物で戦えば命を危険にさらすことになります」
languages.original_text: "I'm afraid your sword is a fake. You are risking your life by going into battle with it."

traits.locale_text: 「恐縮ですが、お剣は偽物です。偽物で戦えば命を危険にさらすことになります」
